AnalysisSettings - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model
A class containing the user's current image processing settings for the plugin.

apply() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
The main entry point for the "Apply preprocessing parameters" button logic.
applyButton - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
 
applyButton - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Button to apply all selected preprocessing parameters to the image stack.
applyButton - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
 
applyMorphology() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
Permanently applies the selected morphological operation and optional watershed to the entire binary mask stack, then advances the workflow to the particle analysis parameters step.
applyMorphology(ImagePlus) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
 
applyMorphology(ImagePlus) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCServiceImpl
 
applyMorphology(ImagePlus, String, boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel.MorphologyManager
Permanently applies the selected operations to the entire image stack.
applyOperationsToProcessor(ImageProcessor, String) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel.MorphologyManager
Helper method to execute the math on a specific ImageProcessor.
applyRangeField - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Text field to specify a custom slice range to process (e.g.
applyThreshold() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Converts the current threshold preview into a binary mask by calling LDCService.applyThreshold(ImagePlus), stores it in the LeftPanel, and advances the workflow to the morphological operations step.
applyThreshold(ImagePlus) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
Apply final conversion to mask.
applyThreshold(ImagePlus) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCServiceImpl
 
applyThreshold(ImagePlus) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel.ThresholdingManager
Creates a NEW binary mask image based on the current threshold settings.
applyUIWithParams() - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.PipelineSubPanel
Applies treatments of the current UI class with the current analysis parameters.
applyUIWithParams() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
Applies the current morphological parameters to the binary mask by triggering the apply logic.
applyUIWithParams() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
 
applyUIWithParams() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Applies the current preprocessing parameters to the entire image stack.
applyUIWithParams() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
 
applyWatershedToProcessor(ImageProcessor) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel.MorphologyManager
Applies the Watershed transform to a single ImageProcessor using ImageJ's Euclidean Distance Map (EDM).
areaCheckbox - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
